message.content:
Explore the reference SAM API Gateway configuration at /Users/saurabhtyagi/ws/dns-data-services-api/src/sam/api/right_to_erasure.

Goals:
1. Read EVERY file in that directory (template.yaml, any parameters, any openapi spec, README, etc.). Report full contents or key excerpts.
2. Report how the API Gateway (AWS::Serverless::Api or AWS::ApiGateway::RestApi) is defined — authentication (IAM, Cognito, Lambda authorizer, API key, none?), stages, CORS, throttling, WAF, tracing, logging, custom domain.
3. Report any OpenAPI / Swagger definition body used and its key paths/methods.
4. Report how Lambda integrations are wired (proxy integration vs non-proxy, request/response templates, etc.).
5. Report related parameters, mappings, conditions, outputs.
6. Look one or two levels up (/Users/saurabhtyagi/ws/dns-data-services-api/src/sam/api/ and /src/sam/) for any shared configuration, base templates, or nested stack patterns that the right_to_erasure template depends on.
7. Check if there's a Makefile or build process we should mirror.

Report file paths, key resource names, and verbatim snippets of the important API Gateway config so we can replicate the pattern in /Users/saurabhtyagi/Documents/workspace/dns-de-rte-orchestrator/template.yaml.

Under 700 words. Read-only exploration only.

content.text: I'll explore the reference SAM API Gateway configuration in parallel.

1	AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
2	Transform: AWS::Serverless-2016-10-31
3	Description: Right-to-erasure request API
4	
5	Parameters:
6	  ApplicationName:
7	    Description: Name of application
8	    Type: String
9	    Default: 'right-to-erasure-request'
10	  Environment:
11	    Description: Environment details
12	    Type: String
13	  ApiDescription:
14	    Description: API description
15	    Type: String
16	    Default: 'DNS Right to Erasure Request API'
17	  VPCEndpointId:
18	    Description: VPC Endpoint Id to access the API
19	    Type: String
20	  Region:
21	    Description: Region where Lambda is hosted
22	    Type: String
23	  TeamName:
24	    Description: Team responsible for application
25	    Type: String
26	    Default: DE
27	  VpcId:
28	    Description: The VPC
29	    Type: String
30	  HostedZoneId:
31	    Description: Route53 Hosted Zone Id
32	    Type: String
33	  CertificateArn:
34	    Description: SSL Certificate
35	    Type: String
36	  AlbListenerArn:
37	    Description: Application Load Balancer Listener that will redirect requests to the vpc endpoint associated to this API
38	    Type: String
39	
40	Resources:
41	
42	  ServerlessAccessManager:
43	    Type: Custom::ServerlessAccessManager
44	    Properties:
45	      ServiceToken: !Sub "arn:aws:lambda:eu-west-1:${AWS::AccountId}:function:paas-serverless-access-manager"
46	      FunctionName: !Sub "${ApplicationName}-${Environment}"
47	      VpcExecution: 'true'
48	      Targets:
49	        DevTargetDynamoDB:
50	          Type: DynamoDB
51	          Properties:
52	            Table: raw-erasure-requests-dev
53	        ProdTargetDynamoDB:
54	          Type: DynamoDB
55	          Properties:
56	            Table: raw-erasure-requests-prod
57	
58	  DnsRteApi:
59	    Type: AWS::Serverless::Api
60	    Properties:
61	      StageName: !Ref Environment
62	      OpenApiVersion: '2.0'
63	      Description: !Ref ApiDescription
64	      EndpointConfiguration:
65	        Type: PRIVATE
66	        VPCEndpointIds:
67	          - !Ref VPCEndpointId
68	      Auth:
69	        ApiKeyRequired: false
70	        ResourcePolicy:
71	          CustomStatements:
72	            - {
73	                Effect: 'Allow',
74	                Action: 'execute-api:Invoke',
75	                Resource: ['arn:aws:execute-api:eu-west-1:334512769709:*'],
76	                Principal: '*'
77	              }
78	            - {
79	                Effect: 'Deny',
80	                Action: 'execute-api:Invoke',
81	                Resource: ['arn:aws:execute-api:eu-west-1:334512769709:*'],
82	                Principal: '*',
83	                Condition: {
84	                  "StringNotEquals": {
85	                    "aws:SourceVpce": !Ref VPCEndpointId
86	                  }
87	                }
88	              }
89	
90	  RteRequestAPI:
91	    Type: AWS::Serverless::Function
92	    Properties:
93	      CodeUri: ./src
94	      Handler: rte_request_handler.lambda_handler
95	      FunctionName: !GetAtt ServerlessAccessManager.FunctionName
96	      Role: !GetAtt ServerlessAccessManager.LambdaExecutionRoleArn
97	      Tags:
98	        application:  !Ref ApplicationName
99	        created_by: cloudformation
100	        team: !Ref TeamName
101	      VpcConfig: !GetAtt ServerlessAccessManager.VpcConfig
102	      Runtime: python3.8
103	      Environment:
104	        Variables:
105	          Region: !Ref Region
106	          Env: !Ref Environment
107	      Architectures:
108	        - x86_64
109	      Events:
110	        RightToErasureRequestEvent:
111	          Type: Api
112	          Properties:
113	            RestApiId: !Ref DnsRteApi
114	            Path: "/privacy/customer/erasure"
115	            Method: "post"
116	            RequestParameters:
117	              - method.request.querystring.case-number:
118	                  Required: true
119	              - method.request.querystring.email:
120	                  Required: true
121	              - method.request.querystring.market:
122	                  Required: true
123	              - method.request.querystring.och-id:
124	                  Required: false
125	              - method.request.querystring.horizon-id:
126	                  Required: false
127	
128	  ServiceListenerRule:
129	    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::ListenerRule
130	    DependsOn:
131	      - DnsRteApi
132	    Properties:
133	      Actions:
134	        - Type: redirect
135	          RedirectConfig:
136	            Protocol: "HTTPS"
137	            Port: "443"
138	            Host: !Sub "${DnsRteApi}-${VPCEndpointId}.execute-api.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com"
139	            Path: !Sub "/${Environment}/#{path}"
140	            Query: "#{query}"
141	            StatusCode: "HTTP_301"
142	      Conditions:
143	        - Field: path-pattern
144	          PathPatternConfig:
145	            Values:
146	              - "/privacy/*"
147	      ListenerArn: !Ref AlbListenerArn
148	      Priority: 2

21	build-sam:

25	    - cd src/sam
26	    - sam build --config-env ci
27	  artifacts:
28	    expire_in: 1 week
29	    paths:
30	      - src/sam/.aws-sam
31	
32	.deploy-sam:
33	  image: public.ecr.aws/sam/build-python3.8:latest
34	  variables:
35	    ENV: datalake
36	    ASSUME_ROLE: "TRUE"
37	    AWS_DEFAULT_REGION: "eu-west-1"
38	  script:
39	    - cd src/sam
40	    - sam deploy --config-env ${SAM_ENV}
41	  needs: [build-sam]
42	
43	deploy-sam-dev:
44	  variables:
45	    SAM_ENV: dev
46	  environment:
47	    name: dev-sam
48	  extends:
49	    - .deploy-sam
50	  stage: deploy
51	  needs: [build-sam]
52	  when: manual
53	
54	deploy-sam-prod:
55	  variables:
56	    SAM_ENV: prod
57	  environment:
58	    name: prod-sam
59	  extends:
60	    - .deploy-sam
61	    - .prod
62	  stage: deploy
63	  needs: [build-sam]

1	AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
2	Transform: AWS::Serverless-2016-10-31
3	Description: DNS Data Services API
4	
5	Parameters:
6	  Region:
7	    Description: Region where Lambda is hosted
8	    Type: String
9	  SecretName:
10	    Description: Secret Manager reference of secret
11	    Type: String
12	  Environment:
13	    Description: Environment
14	    Type: String
15	  VPCEndpointId:
16	    Description: VPC Endpoint Id to access the API
17	    Type: String
18	  VpcId:
19	    Description: The VPC
20	    Type: String
21	  HostedZoneId:
22	    Description: Route53 Hosted Zone Id
23	    Type: String
24	  CertificateArn:
25	    Description: SSL Certificate
26	    Type: String
27	
28	# Create our resources with separate CloudFormation templates resources:
29	Resources:
30	  DnsAlb:
31	    Type: AWS::Serverless::Application
32	    DeletionPolicy: Retain
33	    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
34	    Properties:
35	      Location: ./alb/template.yml
36	      Parameters:
37	        Environment: !Ref Environment
38	        VpcId: !Ref VpcId
39	        HostedZoneId: !Ref HostedZoneId
40	        CertificateArn: !Ref CertificateArn
41	
42	  DnsCustomerPurchaseOrderHistory:
43	    Type: AWS::Serverless::Application
44	    DependsOn:
45	      - DnsAlb
46	    DeletionPolicy: Retain
47	    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
48	    Properties:
49	      Location: ./api/customer_purchase_history/template.yml
50	      Parameters:
51	        ApplicationName: "customer-purchase-history"
52	        Environment: !Ref Environment
53	        Region: !Ref Region
54	        SecretName: !Ref SecretName
55	        Timeout: 1
56	        VPCEndpointId: !Ref VPCEndpointId
57	        ApiDescription: 'DNS Customer Purchase History API'
58	        AlbListenerArn: !GetAtt DnsAlb.Outputs.AlbListenerArn

1	import logging
2	import os
3	
4	import boto3
5	from datetime import datetime
6	import re
7	
8	logger = logging.getLogger()
9	logger.setLevel(logging.INFO)
10	dynamodb_client = boto3.resource('dynamodb')
11	
12	
13	def create_connection(env):
14	    logging.info("Establishing connection")
15	    try:
16	        #Connect to the DynamoDB table
17	        conn = dynamodb_client.Table('raw-erasure-requests-' + env)
18	
19	    except Exception as e:
20	        logger.error("Error while connecting to DynamoDB {}".format(e))
21	        raise ValueError("Error while connecting to DyanamoDB {}".format(e))
22	
23	    return conn
24	
25	def lambda_handler(event, context):
26	    #metrics = MetricsPublisher()
27	    env = os.environ['Env']
28	    # cw_metric_dim = [{'Name': 'env', 'Value': env}, {'Name': 'app', 'Value': 'right_to_erasure_request'}, {'Name': 'api_type','Value': 'raw_erasure_request'}]
29	    #metric_success_name = f'right_to_erasure_request_success'
30	    #metric_failure_name = f'right_to_erasure_request_failure'
31	    if not event.get('queryStringParameters'):
32	        error_message = "Missing required parameters: queryStringParameters"
33	        print(error_message)
34	        #    metrics.publish(metric_failure_name, 1, cw_metric_dim)
35	        return {
36	            "statusCode": 400,
37	            "body": "Error: {}".format(error_message)
38	        }
39	    missing_parameters = []
40	    if "case-number" not in event['queryStringParameters'] or "email" not in event['queryStringParameters'] or "market" not in event['queryStringParameters'] or "reason" not in event['queryStringParameters']:
41	        if "case-number" not in event['queryStringParameters']:
42	            missing_parameters.append("Case number")
43	        if "email" not in event['queryStringParameters']:
44	            missing_parameters.append("Email")
45	        if "market" not in event['queryStringParameters']:
46	            missing_parameters.append("Market")
47	        if "reason" not in event['queryStringParameters']:
48	            missing_parameters.append("Reason")
49	        error_message = "Missing required parameters: {}".format(", ".join(missing_parameters))
50	        #    metrics.publish(metric_failure_name, 1, cw_metric_dim)
51	        print(error_message)
52	        return {
53	            "statusCode": 400,
54	            "body": "Error: {}".format(error_message)
55	        }
56	
57	    case_number = event['queryStringParameters']['case-number']
58	    email = event['queryStringParameters']['email']
59	    market = event['queryStringParameters']['market']
60	    reason = event['queryStringParameters']['reason']
61	    och_id = None
62	    horizon_id = None
63	    if "och-id" in event['queryStringParameters']:
64	        och_id = event['queryStringParameters']['och-id']
65	
66	    if ("horizon-id") in event['queryStringParameters']:
67	        horizon_id = event['queryStringParameters']['horizon-id']
68	
69	    conn = create_connection(env)
70	
71	    try:
72	        #logics
73	        email_pattern = r'[\w\.-]+@[\w\.-]+\.\w{1,4}'
74	        email_match = re.search(email_pattern, email)
75	        case_number_size = len(case_number)
76	        email_size = len(email)
77	        market_size = len(market)
78	        reason_size = len(reason)
79	        accepted_reasons = ["purge", "rte"]
80	        accepted_markets = ["10", "30", "40", "60"]
81	        empty_parameters = []
82	        error_messages = []
83	        #Checks for any empty required parameters
84	        if case_number_size == 0 or email_size == 0 or market_size == 0 or reason_size == 0:
85	            if case_number_size == 0:
86	                empty_parameters.append("Case number")
87	            if email_size == 0:
88	                empty_parameters.append("Email")
89	            if market_size == 0:
90	                empty_parameters.append("Market")
91	            if reason_size == 0:
92	                empty_parameters.append("Reason")
93	
94	            print("Missing parameters:")
95	            print(empty_parameters)
96	            response = {
97	                "statusCode": 400,
98	                "body": "List of missing parameters: {}".format(", ".join(empty_parameters))
99	            }
100	        #        metrics.publish(metric_failure_name, 1, cw_metric_dim)
101	        else:
102	
103	            #This queries for all the records with this case number and in the if statement, checks whether the reason that is being passed in matches with
104	            #the any existing reason with the same case_number
105	            matching_case_number_response = conn.query(
106	                KeyConditionExpression='case_number = :case_number',
107	                ExpressionAttributeValues = {
108	                    ':case_number': case_number
109	                }
110	            )
111	            records = matching_case_number_response.get('Items')
112	
113	            #Checks for any malformed and whitespaces or unrecognised email or market or unmatching reason
114	            if not email_match or " " in email or " " in case_number or not (4 <= case_number_size <= 30) or market not in accepted_markets or reason not in accepted_reasons or (reason == "rte" and case_number.startswith("DELETED") or (reason == "purge" and case_number.startswith("ERASURE"))) or (any(record.get('reason') != reason and record.get('reason') is not None for record in records)):
115	                if not email_match:
116	                    error_messages.append("Email: {} was not entered correctly ".format(email))
117	                if " " in email:
118	                    error_messages.append("Detected whitespace in Email: {}, '+' translates to a whitespace ".format(email))
119	                if " " in case_number:
120	                    error_messages.append("Detected whitespace in case number: {} ".format(case_number))
121	                if not (4 <= case_number_size <= 30):
122	                    error_messages.append("Case number: {} has an unusual length: 4 to 30 characters expected ".format(case_number))
123	                if market not in accepted_markets:
124	                    error_messages.append("Market: {} is invalid. 10, 30, 40, 60 is expected".format(market))
125	                if reason not in accepted_reasons:
126	                    error_messages.append("Reason: {} is invalid. rte or purge is expected".format(reason))
127	                if (reason == "rte" and case_number.startswith("DELETED") or (reason == "purge" and case_number.startswith("ERASURE"))):
128	                    error_messages.append("Reason: {} is not matching with the case_number: {}".format(reason, case_number))
129	                if any(record.get('reason') != reason and record.get('reason') is not None for record in records):
130	                    error_messages.append("Existing case_number: {} has a different 'reason' to {}".format(case_number, reason))
131	
132	                print(error_messages)
133	                response = {
134	                    "statusCode": 400,
135	                    "body": "Error(s): {}".format(", ".join(error_messages))
136	                }
137	            #            metrics.publish(metric_failure_name, 1, cw_metric_dim)
138	            else:
139	                current_ts = datetime.now()
140	                formatted_ts = current_ts.strftime("%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S.%f")[:-3] + "Z"
141	                #create a new request to be stored in the table
142	                new_request = {
143	                    'case_number': case_number,
144	                    'email_id': email,
145	                    'och_id': och_id,
146	                    'horizon_id': horizon_id,
147	                    'received_at': formatted_ts,
148	                    'market_id': market,
149	                    'reason': reason,
150	                    'requires_merging': 'yes'
151	                }
152	                condition_expression = 'attribute_not_exists(case_number) AND attribute_not_exists(market_id)'
153	                #Checks the inputs and inserts the new request in the table if there are no duplicates
154	                logger.info("Inserting request into DynamoDB")
155	                try:
156	                    conn.put_item(Item=new_request,
157	                                  ConditionExpression=condition_expression)
158	                    response = {
159	                        "statusCode": 200,
160	                        "body": "Request with case number {} with market {} was successfully inserted".format(case_number,market)
161	                    }
162	                #                metrics.publish(metric_success_name, 1, cw_metric_dim)
163	
164	                except dynamodb_client.meta.client.exceptions.ConditionalCheckFailedException as e:
165	                    error_message = 'PutItem failed because item with case-id: {} and market: {} combination already exists'.format(case_number, market)
166	                    print(error_message)
167	                    response = {
168	                        "statusCode": 400,
169	                        "body": "Error: {}".format(error_message)
170	                    }
171	                    #                metrics.publish(metric_failure_name, 1, cw_metric_dim)
172	                    logger.error("Error {} : {}".format(error_message,e))
173	
174	    except Exception as e:
175	        logger.error("Error while connecting to DynamoDB {}".format(e))
176	        raise ValueError("Error while connecting to DynamoDB {}".format(e))
177	
178	    return response

content.text:
I have everything needed. Here's the consolidated report.

---

# Findings: `right_to_erasure` SAM Reference

## 1. Files in target directory

All files under `/Users/saurabhtyagi/ws/dns-data-services-api/src/sam/api/right_to_erasure/`:

- `template.yml` (4458 bytes) — main SAM template
- `samconfig.toml` — deploy config (dev/prod)
- `.gitlab-ci.yml` — CI build/deploy
- `__init__.py` (empty)
- `src/rte_request_handler.py` — Lambda handler
- `src/test_event.json`
- `src/__init__.py`

No OpenAPI spec file, no README, no Makefile. Swagger body is NOT used — SAM implicit events generate the API.

## 2. API Gateway definition (`DnsRteApi`)

From `/Users/saurabhtyagi/ws/dns-data-services-api/src/sam/api/right_to_erasure/template.yml` lines 58-88:

```yaml
DnsRteApi:
  Type: AWS::Serverless::Api
  Properties:
    StageName: !Ref Environment
    OpenApiVersion: '2.0'
    Description: !Ref ApiDescription
    EndpointConfiguration:
      Type: PRIVATE
      VPCEndpointIds:
        - !Ref VPCEndpointId
    Auth:
      ApiKeyRequired: false
      ResourcePolicy:
        CustomStatements:
          - { Effect: 'Allow', Action: 'execute-api:Invoke',
              Resource: ['arn:aws:execute-api:eu-west-1:334512769709:*'],
              Principal: '*' }
          - { Effect: 'Deny', Action: 'execute-api:Invoke',
              Resource: ['arn:aws:execute-api:eu-west-1:334512769709:*'],
              Principal: '*',
              Condition: { "StringNotEquals":
                { "aws:SourceVpce": !Ref VPCEndpointId } } }
```

Key facts:
- **Auth**: NO IAM/Cognito/Lambda authorizer/API key. Access control is ONLY via the VPC Endpoint resource policy (deny unless source VPCE matches).
- **Endpoint**: `PRIVATE` tied to a VPC Endpoint.
- **Stage**: single stage = `${Environment}` (e.g. `dev`, `prod`).
- **OpenApi version**: `2.0` (Swagger). No inline `DefinitionBody`.
- **Not configured**: CORS, throttling, WAF, X-Ray tracing, access logging, custom domain, usage plan, MethodSettings. All defaults.

## 3. OpenAPI / Swagger

No explicit OpenAPI definition — the path/method are declared via the SAM `Events` block on the Lambda (lines 109-126):

```yaml
Events:
  RightToErasureRequestEvent:
    Type: Api
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref DnsRteApi
      Path: "/privacy/customer/erasure"
      Method: "post"
      RequestParameters:
        - method.request.querystring.case-number: { Required: true }
        - method.request.querystring.email:       { Required: true }
        - method.request.querystring.market:      { Required: true }
        - method.request.querystring.och-id:      { Required: false }
        - method.request.querystring.horizon-id:  { Required: false }
```

## 4. Lambda integration

- **Integration type**: implicit AWS_PROXY (SAM default for `Type: Api`). No custom request/response templates.
- Function `RteRequestAPI` (lines 90-108): `Runtime: python3.8`, `Handler: rte_request_handler.lambda_handler`, `CodeUri: ./src`, `Architectures: [x86_64]`.
- FunctionName, Role and VpcConfig all pulled from a `Custom::ServerlessAccessManager` custom resource (lines 42-56) — an internal PaaS Lambda at `arn:aws:lambda:eu-west-1:${AWS::AccountId}:function:paas-serverless-access-manager`, which provisions IAM role + VPC config and grants DynamoDB access to `raw-erasure-requests-{dev|prod}`.
- Env vars: `Region`, `Env`.

## 5. Parameters / Conditions / Outputs

- **Parameters**: `ApplicationName`, `Environment`, `ApiDescription`, `VPCEndpointId`, `Region`, `TeamName`, `VpcId`, `HostedZoneId`, `CertificateArn`, `AlbListenerArn`.
- **Conditions**: none.
- **Mappings**: none.
- **Outputs**: none.
- Extra resource `ServiceListenerRule` (lines 128-147) — `AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::ListenerRule` attached to shared ALB listener, 301-redirects `/privacy/*` to `${DnsRteApi}-${VPCEndpointId}.execute-api.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com/${Environment}/#{path}?#{query}` at priority 2.

## 6. Parent / shared infra

`/Users/saurabhtyagi/ws/dns-data-services-api/src/sam/template.yml` is the root SAM app that nests children as `AWS::Serverless::Application` — but right_to_erasure is NOT nested there (only `DnsAlb` and `DnsCustomerPurchaseOrderHistory` are). right_to_erasure is deployed as its own standalone stack via `sam deploy` from its own directory (`stack_name=dns-data-services-api-rte-request-{env}`).

Shared ALB at `/Users/saurabhtyagi/ws/dns-data-services-api/src/sam/alb/template.yml` exports `AlbListenerArn`; right_to_erasure consumes it via its `AlbListenerArn` parameter (hard-coded ARN in `samconfig.toml`). ALB is internal, HTTPS 443, default action `fixed-response`; Route53 A-record `data.${Environment}.hbi-dns.io`.

## 7. Build process

No Makefile. Build is via GitLab CI (`.gitlab-ci.yml`):

- Image: `public.ecr.aws/sam/build-python3.8:latest`
- Build: `cd src/sam/api/right_to_erasure && sam build --config-env ci`
- Deploy: `sam deploy --no-fail-on-empty-changeset --config-env ${SAM_ENV}` (dev manual, prod on default branch)
- `samconfig.toml` uses `use_container=true`, `capabilities=CAPABILITY_NAMED_IAM CAPABILITY_AUTO_EXPAND`, role `arn:aws:iam::334512769709:role/CFDeploy`, S3 bucket `hbi-dns-infra-datalake`.

## Replication pattern for `dns-de-rte-orchestrator/template.yaml`

Mirror these choices: `AWS::Serverless::Api` with `EndpointConfiguration: PRIVATE` + `VPCEndpointIds`; `Auth.ApiKeyRequired: false` + resource-policy Allow/Deny-on-source-VPCE; `StageName: !Ref Environment`; `OpenApiVersion: '2.0'`; Lambda events via `Type: Api` with `RequestParameters` (proxy integration, no templates); add an `ElasticLoadBalancingV2::ListenerRule` redirect; rely on `paas-serverless-access-manager` custom resource for FunctionName/Role/VpcConfig; no Outputs/Conditions. No CORS/WAF/throttling/custom-domain/tracing/access-logging are configured in the reference.
